search_queries_used: site:asahq.org postanesthesia care PACU oxygenation ventilation airway observation
site:doh.gov.ae day surgery recovery airway monitoring
candidate_sources_rejected: automatic management or dose instructions for PACU airway observation documentation
generic anesthesia landing pages without an exact section for PACU airway observation documentation
rejection_reasons: Rescue and clearance are real-time clinical decisions outside documentation-only scope.
The candidate source category "automatic PACU airway clearance rules" did not provide exact documentation-only evidence for this workflow and was not mapped.
Autonomous management, medication, dose, procedure, escalation, or discharge instructions were outside the documentation-only scope.
Landing pages and search snippets were not accepted as exact evidence.
population_applicability: Patients in PACU or equivalent recovery after general, regional, or monitored anesthesia care.
setting_applicability: Direct for recovery observation and record documentation; active airway management is outside scope.
UAE_applicability: International ASA standard supported by DoH recovery requirements; local PACU policy remains controlling.
recency_verification: Current ASA 2024 and DoH V1/2024 standards were reviewed on 2026-07-13.
superseded_check: The reviewed ASA and DoH standards are current.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact ASA standard supports continual documented oxygenation, ventilation, consciousness, and recovery status in PACU; it does not declare the airway safe or direct intervention.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports documented oxygenation, ventilation, circulation, consciousness, temperature, pain or other recovery observations, and use of a recovery score where appropriate.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact ASA preanesthesia documentation section supports risk, airway, cardiorespiratory, reviewed-investigation, consultation, plan, and consent fields for PACU airway observation documentation; each remains clinician-entered and conditional on assessment.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports identity, disposition, medical, surgical and anesthetic history, medicines, allergies and reactions, fasting, advance directives, airway and cardiopulmonary examination, tests, consultations, ASA status, plan including postanesthesia and pain care, and consent.

unresolved_source_gaps: Airway device, obstruction, respiratory rate, oxygen delivery, saturation values, intervention, response, escalation, and discharge remain unsupported unless clinician-entered.
Legacy duration presets, broad generic interval-history wording, and any content not explicitly mapped to an exact section remain unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No source mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, anesthesia plan, investigation, procedure, medication, dose, referral, discharge decision, or urgency conclusion.
UAE facility policy, credentialing, pathway, and qualified anesthesiologist review remain required before use.
